description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named unit-test that runs on push and pull request events for specific paths and branches. The workflow has read permissions to repository contents and sets Conan login credentials as environment variables. It uses two reusable workflows: conan-recipe-version and unit-test. The conan-recipe-version workflow generates a recipe ID, which is then used by the unit-test workflow to perform C++ unit testing with CTest and Conan.
